prompt:
Create an ultra-photorealistic image using the attached reference image as the identity reference. Ensure the subject closely resembles the person in the reference image, preserving the same facial features, facial proportions, skin tone, and overall likeness. Keep the face completely natural without beautifying, reshaping, or altering any facial characteristics. No nose piercing.

Low-angle close-up selfie inside a luxury car, seated slightly angled toward the camera with her right arm extended naturally to take the photo and her head gently tilted.

Sleek, pin-straight dark brown hair with a center part, minimal natural makeup, glossy pink lips, black spaghetti-strap camisole, dark seatbelt across the left shoulder, slim black cat-eye sunglasses, delicate gold necklace with a small round crystal pendant, and a tiny outlined heart tattoo above the pendant.

Luxury car interior with a panoramic sunroof revealing a bright blue sky. Strong golden-hour sunlight creates dramatic cinematic contrast, with warm light on her face and deep shadows inside the cabin.

Shot on a Sony A7R V, 35mm f/1.4 lens, natural wide-angle selfie perspective, sharp focus on the subject, soft background blur, ultra-realistic skin texture, premium editorial photography, extremely high detail.

Negative Prompt: low quality, blurry, flat lighting, distorted face, identity drift, altered facial features, extra limbs, cartoon, anime, CGI, plastic skin, watermark, logo, text, nose piercing.
promptEn:
Create an ultra-photorealistic image using the attached reference image as the identity reference. Ensure the subject closely resembles the person in the reference image, preserving the same facial features, facial proportions, skin tone, and overall likeness. Keep the face completely natural without beautifying, reshaping, or altering any facial characteristics. No nose piercing.

Low-angle close-up selfie inside a luxury car, seated slightly angled toward the camera with her right arm extended naturally to take the photo and her head gently tilted.

Sleek, pin-straight dark brown hair with a center part, minimal natural makeup, glossy pink lips, black spaghetti-strap camisole, dark seatbelt across the left shoulder, slim black cat-eye sunglasses, delicate gold necklace with a small round crystal pendant, and a tiny outlined heart tattoo above the pendant.

Luxury car interior with a panoramic sunroof revealing a bright blue sky. Strong golden-hour sunlight creates dramatic cinematic contrast, with warm light on her face and deep shadows inside the cabin.

Shot on a Sony A7R V, 35mm f/1.4 lens, natural wide-angle selfie perspective, sharp focus on the subject, soft background blur, ultra-realistic skin texture, premium editorial photography, extremely high detail.

Negative Prompt: low quality, blurry, flat lighting, distorted face, identity drift, altered facial features, extra limbs, cartoon, anime, CGI, plastic skin, watermark, logo, text, nose piercing.
promptZh:
使用随附的参考图像作为 身份参考，创建一张超写实的图像。确保主体与参考图像中的人物高度相似，保留相同的面部特征、面部比例、肤色和整体相似度。保持面部完全自然，不进行美颜、重塑或改变任何面部特征。不要有鼻环。

低角度特写自拍 在豪华汽车内，身体略微朝向镜头，右臂自然伸出进行拍摄，头部微微倾斜。

柔顺的深棕色中分直发，极简自然妆容，亮面粉色嘴唇，黑色吊带背心，左肩斜跨深色安全带，纤细的黑色猫眼太阳镜，精致的金色项链配有小圆形水晶吊坠，吊坠上方有一个微小的轮廓心形纹身。

豪华汽车内饰，全景天窗外可见明亮的蓝天。强烈的黄金时刻阳光营造出极具电影感的对比，面部洒满暖光，车厢内部呈现深邃阴影。

使用 Sony A7R V 拍摄，35mm f/1.4 镜头，自然的广角自拍视角，主体焦点清晰，背景虚化柔和，超写实皮肤纹理，高端杂志摄影风格，细节极其丰富。

负面提示词：低质量，模糊，平淡光线，面部扭曲，身份偏移，面部特征改变，多余肢体，卡通，动漫，CGI，塑料感皮肤，水印，标志，文字，鼻环。
